question: Network Traffic per Pod
answer: sum(rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{job="kubelet", namespace=~".+"}[5m])) by (namespace, pod) + sum(rate(container_network_transmit_bytes_total{job="kubelet", namespace=~".+"}[5m])) by (namespace, pod)
